title: rubus centiformis
intro: Rubus centiformis, also known as the Centiflorous bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a deciduous shrub that is native to parts of Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds with potential health benefits, including cardiovascular protection, immune system support, and anti-cancer properties. Rubus centiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
